rationale.D1: Confirmed SubsystemBase subclasses (DriveSubsystem, Hopper, Shooter, Climb) owning vendor motors directly with no IO interfaces anywhere in the codebase; no abstraction layer present.
rationale.D2: Confirmed command composition with button bindings in RobotContainer and simple Command subclasses for autos, but no state machines, enums, or Superstructure coordinator.
rationale.D3: All simulationPeriodic() methods in every subsystem are empty boilerplate stubs with no physics; no ElevatorSim, DCMotorSim, or any WPILib physics class used.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists and no CI workflow files found; zero tests of any kind.
rationale.D5: SmartDashboard imported but only appears in commented-out code; active logging is System.out.println in command isFinished() methods only; no structured telemetry.
rationale.D6: AutoBuilder.configure() is wired and PathPlanner .path/.auto files are authored, but getAutonomousCommand() returns a timed AutoDriveForward and the PathPlannerAuto line is commented out, so PathPlanner is not actually executed.
rationale.D7: A Limelight subsystem class exists with getBotPoseEstimate code but is never instantiated anywhere; addVisionMeasurement is never called from robot code; vision is completely unused.
rationale.D8: A real (though minimal) README exists, consistent package structure is maintained, and 3 seasons are tracked, but no CI, no library, and no formatter configured.

D1: src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/Shooter.java:61 — TalonFX shooterMotor field owned directly in subsystem
src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/DriveSubsystem.java:42 — MAXSwerveModule constructed directly, no IO layer
D2: src/main/java/frc/robot/RobotContainer.java:364 — getAutonomousCommand returns timed drive, no coordinator
D4: src/test directory does not exist — confirmed by filesystem search returning no results
D6: src/main/deploy/pathplanner/autos/Back Up and Shoot.auto:1 — authored PathPlanner auto file
src/main/java/frc/robot/RobotContainer.java:321 — PathPlannerAuto call commented out; timed auto used instead
D7: src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/Limelight.java:18 — Limelight class defined but never instantiated in RobotContainer
